popup.createLoreSubtitle: Create a new lore entity with a specific category.
popup.linkSecretSubtitle: Link "{{text}}" to a secret as a foreshadowing marker.
popup.makeConnectionSubtitle: Create a knowledge entry from the selected text.
popup.writeNotePlaceholder: Write your note here... (Ctrl+Enter to save)
popup.writeAnnotationPlaceholder: Write your annotation note... (Ctrl+Enter to save)
popup.linkTwistRevealSubtitle: Mark "{{text}}" as the reveal point for a twist.
popup.linkForeshadowSubtitle: Link "{{text}}" to a twist as a foreshadowing marker.

editor.selectChapterPrompt: Select a chapter to begin writing...
editor.sprintWarning: You're in a writing sprint! You can't exit focus mode until you reach your word goal.
editor.updateReferencesWarning: You renamed "{{old}}" to "{{new}}". We found multiple linked references in your manuscript. Do you want to update the text across your project?
editor.duplicateExactMsg: You already have a character named "{{name}}". Are you sure you want to make a new character?
editor.duplicateExactMsgAny: You already have an entry named "{{name}}". Are you sure you want to make a new one?
editor.duplicatePartialMsg: "{{matchName}}" already exists in your database. Is "{{newName}}" an alias of this character, or a new entry?
editor.duplicatePartialMsgAny: "{{matchName}}" already exists in your database. Is "{{newName}}" an alias of this entry, or a new entry?

extractor.title: Entity Detection
extractor.subtitle: We detected the following entities in your text. Review and classify them before import.
extractor.pastePrompt: Paste your worldbuilding notes, character sheets, or reference text below.
extractor.lowConfHint: These may be entity names but we're not sure of their type.
extractor.errorAnalysis: Entity analysis failed. Ensure the language model is downloaded.
extractor.noEntitiesHint: The NLP model found no recognizable names. Try pasting more text or ensure the language model is downloaded.

inspector.deleteNoteWarning: This action is permanent. Any text bound to this note will automatically lose its reference and revert to normal text.
inspector.deleteEntityWarning: This action is permanent. Any mentions in the text will lose their links and revert to normal text.
inspector.noPovKnowledge: No POV character set for this chapter. Set a POV to filter knowledge.
inspector.noWorldTime: No world time set for this chapter. Set a world time in the chapter metadata to filter.
inspector.deleteAnnotationWarning: This action is permanent. The annotation will be removed and its anchor in the text will lose its reference.
inspector.annotationExportNote: This annotation will appear as a footnote at the bottom of its page when exported.
inspector.noWeather: No environment anomalies or active weather states detected for this time.
inspector.noActiveTimeContext: No active chapter time context. Showing default environment.

ide.themePlaceholder: What is the central theme of this story?
ide.createFirstPrompt: Create your first chapter to start writing.
ide.focusModeLocked: Finish your sprint to access this
ide.deletePrompt1: Are you sure you want to delete Chapter
ide.deletePrompt2: This will remove its markdown file and SHIFT all subsequent chapters down by one to fill the gap.

picker.title: FleshNote Projects
picker.subtitle: Select a project or establish a new workspace.
picker.scanPrompt: Select a workspace folder to scan for projects.
picker.noProjects: No projects found in this workspace.
picker.deletePrompt: Are you sure you want to permanently delete
picker.deleteWarning1: This will remove all chapters, database files, and character sheets from your hard drive. This action
picker.deleteFailed: Failed to delete project. Make sure files are not in use.
picker.aboutSubtitle: A no-bullshit writing tool designed for writing first, with seamless notetaking second.
picker.kofiSubtitle: Creating this app took a lot of work, if you found this app helped you write, please consider throwing me a bone
picker.discordSubtitle: You found a bug/have a feature idea? join our discord!

q.errorCreating: Error creating project. Check terminal for python logs.
q.nameTaken: A project with this name already exists in this workspace.
q.step1Subtitle: Establish the baseline parameters for your new project.
q.step2Subtitle: Configure the core physical and societal modules.
q.step3Subtitle: Toggles for plotting, pacing, and epistemic mechanics.

setup.readySubtitle: How would you like to start?
setup.startFreshDesc: Set up your world and start writing from Chapter 1
setup.importStoryDesc: Bring in an existing manuscript and split it into chapters
setup.skipSetup: Skip setup — I'll configure everything manually
setup.worldSettingSubtitle: Establish the baseline for your story's world.
setup.charactersSubtitle: Add your protagonist and key characters. The first character becomes the POV for Chapter 1.
setup.storyScopeSubtitle: How long is your story? This generates a chapter skeleton you can always edit later.
setup.importManuscriptSubtitle: Select your manuscript file. We'll attempt to split it into chapters automatically.
setup.wbSubtitle: Want to import character, location, or item data from reference documents?
setup.charSetupSubtitle: Add at least one character to set as the POV for your first chapter.
setup.skipWbDesc: I'll add worldbuilding data as I write
setup.openExtractorDesc: Dual-pane data extractor with NLP detection

exportModal.title: Export Project
exportModal.modeProseDesc: Pure manuscript text. Entity links become plain text, all markers removed.
exportModal.modeNotesDesc: {{annotations}} export annotations become footnotes. Quick notes discarded.
exportModal.modeFullDesc: Everything preserved. {{entities}} entity links, annotations, epistemic markers.
exportModal.formatTxtDesc: Plain text. All formatting stripped. Chapter breaks as blank lines.
exportModal.formatMdDesc: Clean portable Markdown. Custom syntax removed. Works in Obsidian, GitHub, etc.
exportModal.formatHtmlDesc: Self-contained HTML with embedded typography. One file, looks great in any browser.
exportModal.formatDocxDesc: Word document with manuscript-standard styles. Ready for editors or further formatting.
exportModal.formatPdfDesc: Print-ready PDF. Optimized page layout, proper margins, publication standard.
exportModal.formatEpubDesc: E-book format. Reflowable content for Kindle, Kobo, Apple Books.
exportModal.autoMetrics: {{fontSize}}pt type · {{leading}}pt leading · {{gutter}}" gutter · {{outer}}" outer · {{width}}" × {{height}}" text area
exportModal.alternativeDesc: {{pages}} pages in {{currentTrim}} trim might not be ideal. {{recTrim}} ({{recSub}}) would give you a more natural book feel.
exportModal.footerProse: {{notes}} quick notes and {{entities}} entity links will be stripped from output.
exportModal.footerNotes: {{annotations}} annotations → footnotes. {{notes}} quick notes discarded. {{entities}} entity links → plain text.
exportModal.footerFull: All {{entities}} entity links, {{annotations}} annotations, and epistemic markers preserved in format-appropriate way.
exportModal.footerSpecs: Book specs based on industry print-on-demand standards. Adjust freely in your word processor after export.
exportModal.previewNote: Preview shows first selected chapter only
exportModal.noChaptersWarning: ⚠ Select at least one chapter to export.

focus.modeNormalDesc: Hides sidebars, toolbars, and removes entity colors from text for pure writing focus.
focus.modeKamikazeDesc: Words start deleting if you stop typing for 1 minute.
focus.modeHemingwayDesc: Backspace and Delete keys are disabled. Write forward only.
focus.modeFogDesc: Characters disappear outside your immediate typing radius.
focus.modeMomentumDesc: Type faster to fill a bar and release magical runes.
focus.modeComboDesc: Build a combo multiplier. Deleting too much breaks it.
focus.modeZenDesc: Grow a beautiful tree as you approach your word goal.
focus.sprintWarning: Warning: You cannot exit a Sprint Mode until you type your word goal.

settings.title: Project Settings
settings.janitorDesc: Choose which types of suggestions The Janitor shows in the side panel.
settings.janitorSdtConfidenceDesc: Lower = more suggestions (may include false positives). Higher = only high-confidence tells.
settings.epistemicDesc: Track who knows what, and filter the entity inspector based on the current POV character.
settings.milestonesDesc: Track future plot points and their prerequisites.
settings.dualTimelineDesc: Track both narrative reading order and chronological world time.
settings.customCalendarDesc: Enable custom months, days, and seasons for world dates.
settings.storyLanguageDesc: This dictates which Natural Language Processing model is used for entity extraction and text analysis.
settings.modelReady: NLP Model is downloaded and ready.
settings.experimentalDesc: These features require a downloaded model for full capabilities.
settings.sensoryCheckDesc: Analyze prose for balance of sight, sound, smell, touch, and taste.
settings.voiceDetectorDesc: Detect variations in dialogue vocabulary and structure between characters.
settings.dyslexiaModeDesc: Override all fonts with OpenDyslexic to improve readability for some users.
settings.hotkeysDesc: The two highlighted shortcuts can be customised — click a key combo to change it.
settings.hotkeysJanitorNote: These shortcuts are active while the Janitor sidebar is open and focused.

twist.warning_unforeshadowed: This twist has no foreshadowing — the reveal may feel like it comes from nowhere.
twist.warning_sparse: Only {{count}} foreshadow(s) across {{words}} words — readers may forget the setup.
twist.warning_clustered: All markers are within 500 words — consider spreading foreshadowing further apart.
twist.warning_desert_gap: Largest gap between markers: {{gap}} words — a long silence which may lose reader attention.

outliner.title: Outliner
outliner.desc: Create 5 story blocks in the planner before writing 100 words.

discovery.title: Discovery Writer
discovery.desc: Write at least 2000 words without using the planner.

planner_1.title: All According to Plan
planner_1.desc: Add a storyblock in the planner.

chekhov_5.title: Chekhov's Gunman
chekhov_5.desc: Link 5 foreshadows to a single twist.

chekhov_10.title: Chekhov's Apocalypse
chekhov_10.desc: Link 10 foreshadows to a single twist.

beta.title: Beta Reader
beta.desc: Have all your chapters be in 'Revised' or 'Final' state.

steves.title: Planet of Steves
steves.desc: Create 3 character entries with the exact same name.

asspull.title: Asspull
asspull.desc: Create a knowledge state where a character learns something before they are even born.

zen.title: Gardener
zen.desc: Finish a sprint in Zen mode (400+ words).

hemingway.title: Editor's Nightmare
hemingway.desc: Finish a sprint in Hemingway mode (1000+ words).

retcon.title: Retcon
retcon.desc: Delete a twist with existing foreshadows.

stats.needMoreData: Need more writing data... Keep typing! This list will appear soon.
stats.worldHistoryDesc: A generative timeline of your story based on chapter metadata and entity tags.
stats.noEntitiesInChapter: No tracked entities in this chapter.
stats.entityAuditorDesc: Visualizing entity appearances across chapters based on explicit links.
stats.achievementsDesc: Track your writing journey through badges awarded for consistency and volume.
stats.noEntitiesMatch: No entities match the current filters.
stats.confirmBulkDelete: This will permanently delete {{count}} entities. Mentions in text will lose their links.
stats.confirmMerge: Aliases and data from the other entities will be absorbed into the primary. The rest will be deleted.
stats.mergeRequiresSameType: Select 2+ entities of the same type
stats.noData: No items found for this view.
stats.storyHealthDesc: Diagnostics and warnings about your story's structural health.
stats.noIssuesFound: No issues found — your story is looking healthy!
stats.healthOrphanEntity: "{{name}}" ({{type}}) has no mentions in any chapter.
stats.healthTooManyIntros: Ch.{{num}} "{{title}}" introduces {{count}} new entities — readers may struggle to track them.
stats.healthChapterUnderTarget: Ch.{{num}} "{{title}}" is only {{pct}}% of target ({{current}}/{{target}} words).
stats.healthMissingSenseCore: "{{sense}}" is absent from all chapters — consider weaving in some {{sense}}-related description.
stats.healthMissingSenseOptional: "{{sense}}" never appears — not a dealbreaker, but it can add vivid atmosphere.
stats.sensoryAnalysisDesc: Distribution of the five senses across your manuscript, based on sensory vocabulary.
stats.someSensesAbsent: Some senses are completely absent from the selected chapters.
stats.characterTimelineDesc: Visualize entity history across your world's timeline.
stats.noEventsYet: No timeline events yet. Add birth dates and key events to build your world's history.
stats.selectEntityPrompt: Click a timeline lane to inspect events.
stats.timelineNoEntities: No entities of this type yet.
stats.paddingTooltip: Extra years of padding before earliest event

calendar.title: World Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Define your world's time system — months, weeks, seasons, and epochs.
calendar.resetEarthTooltip: Reset all calendar settings to standard Earth defaults
calendar.yearOverviewDesc: Proportional view of your calendar year. Width reflects the number of days in each month.
calendar.comingSoon: The custom world time planner is currently under development. Soon you will be able to define custom months, seasons, and epochs for your world.
calendar.disabledHint: Custom Calendar is disabled. Enable it in Project Settings → Advanced to configure months, weeks, and seasons.

welcomeBack.continueHint: Write whatever comes first. No editing.
welcomeBack.weatherPrompt: Describe the weather or atmosphere in this scene — one sentence.
welcomeBack.weatherHint: Set the mood before you dive back in.
welcomeBack.dialogueLinePrompt: Write one line of dialogue for the next scene moment.
welcomeBack.dialogueLineHint: Don't plan it. Just hear a voice and write what they say.
welcomeBack.openingSentencePrompt: Write the opening sentence of the next paragraph.
welcomeBack.openingSentenceHint: Just one sentence. The rest will follow.
welcomeBack.todayPlanPrompt: What will you work on today?
welcomeBack.todayPlanHint: One sentence or a list. Just make it concrete.
welcomeBack.smellPrompt: What does the air smell like in this scene?
welcomeBack.smellHint: One vivid phrase. Smoke, rain, old paper — whatever fits.
welcomeBack.tempPrompt: Warm or cold? Describe the temperature in this scene.
welcomeBack.tempHint: Be specific. Stifling heat? A chill that creeps in?
welcomeBack.soundPrompt: What sound does your character hear right now?
welcomeBack.lightPrompt: What color is the light in this scene?
welcomeBack.lightHint: Harsh white? The grey of a rainy morning? Golden late sun?
welcomeBack.texturePrompt: Describe something your character could touch right now.
welcomeBack.textureHint: Rough stone, cold metal, worn fabric — what do their hands feel?
welcomeBack.unspokenPrompt: What is {{name}} thinking but won't say out loud?
welcomeBack.charBioHint: Don't aim for perfect. Just put something down.
welcomeBack.charGoalPrompt: What does {{name}} want more than anything?
welcomeBack.charGoalHint: The deeper truth, not what they'd admit to.
welcomeBack.charFeelingPrompt: How does {{name}} feel right now, in this chapter?
welcomeBack.charFeelingHint: Not what they show. What they actually feel.
welcomeBack.charSecretPrompt: What is {{name}} hiding from everyone else?
welcomeBack.charSecretHint: Even a small thing. Authors know things readers don't — yet.
welcomeBack.charLaughHint: Is it rare? Loud? Do they cover their mouth?
welcomeBack.charFearPrompt: What is {{name}} most afraid of losing?
welcomeBack.charFearHint: Not monsters or heights. Something real to them.
welcomeBack.charAppearancePrompt: Describe something about {{name}}'s appearance you haven't put into words yet.
welcomeBack.charAppearanceHint: A habit, a scar, how they hold their hands.
welcomeBack.charDialoguePrompt: Write a line of dialogue {{name}} hasn't said yet but might be thinking.
welcomeBack.charDialogueHint: One sentence. Make it feel like them.
welcomeBack.twistPrompt: Write one subtle sentence that could foreshadow your next twist.
welcomeBack.twistHint: Readers shouldn't notice it on a first read.
welcomeBack.cluePrompt: What clue have you not laid yet? Describe it in 10 words.
welcomeBack.clueHint: Just the idea is enough. You can write it properly later.
welcomeBack.worldDetailPrompt: Describe something in your world that hasn't appeared in any chapter yet.
welcomeBack.worldDetailHint: A place, a custom, a food — anything.
welcomeBack.worldFoodPrompt: What does the most common food in your world taste like?
welcomeBack.worldFoodHint: Even fantasy worlds have bread. What's yours?
welcomeBack.worldSoundPrompt: What's a sound that belongs in your world but hasn't appeared yet?
welcomeBack.worldSoundHint: A market, a festival, a machine, a creature.

janitor.title: The Janitor
janitor.readabilityDesc: See Stats → Senses for the full breakdown

importModal.title: Import
importModal.landingDesc: Add content to your project from external sources.
importModal.importChaptersDesc: Add chapters from a manuscript file (.txt, .md, .docx)
importModal.extractEntitiesDesc: Detect characters and locations using NLP analysis
importModal.importFromProjectDesc: Import entities from another FleshNote project
importModal.externalDesc: Select another FleshNote project folder to import characters, locations, lore, and groups from.

gallery.cropHint: Drag to move • Scroll to resize
